title: Chicago-Kent Climbs to No. 7 in IP Law Rankings
summary_en: Chicago-Kent College of Law has been ranked the 7th-best law school in the nation for intellectual property law by U.S. News & World Report in the publication’s 2026 Best Law Schools rankings. That is...
